{{CargoRelic
|name=New Year Photo
|class_id=20975
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Side by side, Snail and Bird, fireworks burst. Together, to the new year, with a toast.
|fame=30
|art=15
|fth=20
|civ=13
|tech=12
|ss1=Per 5 Sign-Ins, Snail ATK +1<br>Sign-Ins: 365/365
|ss2=Per 5 Sign-Ins, Snail ATK +2<br>Sign-Ins: 365/365
|ss3=Per 5 Sign-Ins, Snail ATK +3<br>Sign-Ins: 365/365
|ss4=Per 5 Sign-Ins, Snail ATK +3<br>Sign-Ins: 365/365
|ss7=Per 5 Sign-Ins, Snail ATK +3<br>Sign-Ins: 365/365<br> (Awakened)
}}
